action: Implemented PHP REST API: config.example.php (template), config.php (auto-detecting Aliyun RDS), restaurants.php (GET/POST with PDO, rate limiting, validation). Required 2 CQR fix iterations for IP spoofing, fake 201 on DB failure, DATE() index issue, CORS allowlist, OPTIONS preflight, double-escaping, double query.
notes: TDD_AUDIT failed first attempt (no test files created). CQR found 7 issues across 2 fix iterations. CORS allowlist now restricts to configured origins only.

task_title: loader.js — 替换为 API 调用
action: Replaced loadRestaurants/loadRestaurantSettings with fetchRestaurants(category) and submitRestaurant(category, name, by) in modules/loader.js. CQR found missing response.ok check — fixed.
notes: CQR found submitRestaurant missing response.ok check before response.json(). Fixed with same pattern used in loadJSON.

action: Replaced renderRestaurantSection with renderRestaurantCarousel in modules/render.js. 5s auto-switch, fade animation, hover pause, clipboard copy, indicator dots, destroy() method.
notes: One CQR fix iteration needed (submitRestaurant response.ok). All other tasks passed first review.

task_title: index.html — 按钮布局 + CSS 清理
action: Updated index.html: CSS cleanup (removed old restaurant styles), three-button layout, modal subtitle, JS imports updated, API-based loading, submitRestaurantAPI function, carousel container added.
notes: Manual UI verification required. No automated tests for index.html changes.

action: Updated test_render.js: deleted old tests for renderRestaurantSection/loadRestaurants/loadRestaurantSettings, added fetchRestaurants/submitRestaurant tests. Deleted data/restaurants.json and data/restaurant-settings.json. Verified .gitignore has api/config.php.
notes: 48 tests pass. Task 5 complete, moving to Task 6 (端到端验证).

action: End-to-end verification complete. 12/14 checklist items PASS. 2 items (POST+suspended=1, rate limit) deferred to DB deployment — code review confirms correct implementation.
notes: All 6 tasks complete. Milestone-6 ready for Post-Milestone Cleanup.
